title: polystichum spinulosum subsp. aemulum
intro: Polystichum spinulosum subsp. aemulum, also known as the spiny-leaved fern, is a type of fern native to the mountains of Japan and China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The spiny-leaved fern has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and is also considered beneficial for the respiratory and cardiovascular systems. In herbal preparations, the spiny-leaved fern is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
